skills.name: inspect_dataset
skills.label: Inspect dataset
skills.description: Summarize the current analysis object and its available annotations.

target_object_id.description: Object to inspect. Defaults to the active object.

include_fields.description: Optional obs fields to emphasize in the summary.

skills.name: assess_dataset
skills.label: Assess dataset
skills.description: Assess whether the uploaded h5ad is raw-like, partially processed, or ready for downstream UMAP and marker analysis.

target_object_id.description: Object to assess. Defaults to the active object.

skills.name: set_active_object
skills.label: Set active object
skills.description: Switch the active analysis object for subsequent operations.

target_object_id.description: Object to make active.

skills.name: summarize_qc
skills.label: Summarize QC
skills.description: Compute standard single-cell QC metrics such as total counts, genes detected, and mitochondrial fraction.

target_object_id.description: Object to summarize. Defaults to the active object.

mt_prefix.description: Gene prefix used to identify mitochondrial genes.

skills.name: plot_qc_metrics
skills.label: Plot QC metrics
skills.description: Render QC distributions such as total counts, genes per cell, and mitochondrial fraction.

target_object_id.description: Object to visualize. Defaults to the active object.

skills.name: filter_cells
skills.label: Filter cells
skills.description: Create a filtered dataset by applying cell-level QC thresholds.

target_object_id.description: Object to filter. Defaults to the active object.

skills.name: filter_genes
skills.label: Filter genes
skills.description: Remove low-information genes based on detection frequency or count thresholds.

target_object_id.description: Object to filter. Defaults to the active object.

min_cells.description: Minimum number of cells expressing a gene.

min_counts.description: Minimum total counts for a gene.

skills.name: normalize_total
skills.label: Normalize total
skills.description: Normalize per-cell counts to a common library size.

target_object_id.description: Object to normalize. Defaults to the active object.

skills.name: log1p_transform
skills.label: Log1p transform
skills.description: Apply log1p transformation to the expression matrix.

target_object_id.description: Object to transform. Defaults to the active object.

skills.name: select_hvg
skills.label: Select HVGs
skills.description: Select highly variable genes for downstream analysis.

target_object_id.description: Object to process. Defaults to the active object.

n_top_genes.description: Number of highly variable genes to keep.

skills.name: scale_matrix
skills.label: Scale matrix
skills.description: Scale the expression matrix, optionally clipping extreme values.

target_object_id.description: Object to scale. Defaults to the active object.

skills.name: run_pca
skills.label: Run PCA
skills.description: Compute principal components for the target object.

target_object_id.description: Object to analyze. Defaults to the active object.

skills.name: compute_neighbors
skills.label: Compute neighbors
skills.description: Build a neighbor graph from PCA or another representation.

target_object_id.description: Object to analyze. Defaults to the active object.

use_rep.description: Representation to use for the graph.

skills.name: run_umap
skills.label: Run UMAP
skills.description: Compute a UMAP embedding for the target object.

target_object_id.description: Object to embed. Defaults to the active object.

skills.name: prepare_umap
skills.label: Prepare UMAP prerequisites
skills.description: Run the preprocessing chain needed before computing a UMAP embedding when the current object is still raw-like.

target_object_id.description: Object to prepare. Defaults to the active object.

include_doublet_filter.description: Whether to include doublet filtering in the preparation chain.

skills.name: plot_umap
skills.label: Plot UMAP
skills.description: Render a UMAP plot from real coordinates on the target object.

target_object_id.description: Object to plot. Defaults to the active object.

palette.description: Matplotlib colormap name used for coloring.

skills.name: plot_gene_umap
skills.label: Plot gene UMAP
skills.description: Plot a UMAP colored by the expression of one or more genes.

target_object_id.description: Object to plot. Defaults to the active object.

genes.description: Gene symbols to overlay on the embedding.

skills.name: subset_cells
skills.label: Subset cells
skills.description: Create a child object by filtering cells from the current object.

target_object_id.description: Object to subset. Defaults to the active object.

skills.name: subcluster_from_global
skills.label: Subcluster from global
skills.description: Keep the parent object unchanged, isolate one annotation group, and rerun a low-count-friendly subcluster workflow only on that subgroup.

target_object_id.description: Parent object used as the global reference. Defaults to the active object.

obs_field.description: Obs field used to isolate the subgroup.

op.description: Comparison operator used for subgroup isolation.

value.description: Subgroup value to isolate before subclustering.

n_top_genes.description: Number of highly variable genes kept for subcluster analysis.

n_neighbors.description: Neighbor count used for the subgroup graph.

min_dist.description: UMAP min_dist parameter used for the subgroup embedding.

skills.name: score_gene_set
skills.label: Score gene set
skills.description: Compute a gene-set score and attach it as an observation column.

target_object_id.description: Object to score. Defaults to the active object.

score_name.description: Name of the output obs column.

skills.name: recluster
skills.label: Recluster
skills.description: Run a reclustering step and create a derived object.

target_object_id.description: Object to recluster. Defaults to the active object.

skills.name: reanalyze_subset
skills.label: Reanalyze subset
skills.description: Take an already extracted subgroup and rerun a low-count-friendly subcluster workflow on that subset.

target_object_id.description: Subset object to reanalyze. Defaults to the active object.

n_top_genes.description: Number of highly variable genes kept for the subset reanalysis.

n_neighbors.description: Neighbor count used for the subset graph.

min_dist.description: UMAP min_dist parameter used for the subset embedding.

resolution.description: Resolution used for the subset reclustering.

skills.name: subcluster_group
skills.label: Subcluster group
skills.description: Take one or more existing clusters, create a subset object, and recluster only that subgroup.

target_object_id.description: Object to subcluster. Defaults to the active object.

groupby.description: Obs field containing the parent cluster labels.

groups.description: Cluster labels to isolate before reclustering.

resolution.description: Resolution used for reclustering the subgroup.

skills.name: rename_clusters
skills.label: Rename clusters
skills.description: Rename cluster labels in an observation column.

target_object_id.description: Object to edit. Defaults to the active object.

mapping.description: Mapping from old labels to new labels.

skills.name: annotate_cell_types
skills.label: Annotate cell types
skills.description: Assign cell-type labels based on known markers or a reference model.

target_object_id.description: Object to annotate. Defaults to the active object.

reference.description: Optional reference atlas or marker set.

skills.name: find_markers
skills.label: Find markers
skills.description: Generate a marker table for the target object.

target_object_id.description: Object to analyze. Defaults to the active object.

groupby.description: Obs field used to define groups.

skills.name: differential_expression
skills.label: Differential expression
skills.description: Compare two groups of cells and produce a differential expression result table.

target_object_id.description: Object to analyze. Defaults to the active object.

groupby.description: Obs field used to define groups.

skills.name: plot_dotplot
skills.label: Plot dotplot
skills.description: Render a dotplot summary for selected genes or markers.

target_object_id.description: Object to visualize. Defaults to the active object.

groupby.description: Obs field used to define groups.

skills.name: plot_violin
skills.label: Plot violin
skills.description: Render a violin-style summary plot for one or more genes.

target_object_id.description: Object to visualize. Defaults to the active object.

groupby.description: Obs field used to define groups.

skills.name: plot_heatmap
skills.label: Plot heatmap
skills.description: Render a heatmap for selected genes across clusters or groups.

target_object_id.description: Object to visualize. Defaults to the active object.

skills.name: plot_celltype_composition
skills.label: Plot composition
skills.description: Plot cell-type or cluster composition across samples or conditions.

target_object_id.description: Object to visualize. Defaults to the active object.

groupby.description: Obs field containing cell types or clusters.

split_by.description: Obs field containing samples or conditions.

skills.name: batch_integrate
skills.label: Batch integrate
skills.description: Run a batch correction or integration workflow across samples.

target_object_id.description: Object to integrate. Defaults to the active object.

method.description: Integration method, such as harmony or scanorama.

skills.name: run_python_analysis
skills.label: Run custom Python analysis
skills.description: Execute a short Python analysis snippet against the in-memory AnnData object when no existing tool is sufficient.

target_object_id.description: Object to analyze. Defaults to the active object.

code.description: Short Python snippet executed against adata, sc, np, pd, and plt.

persist_output.description: Persist the mutated or derived AnnData object as a new object.

output_label.description: Label used when persisting a derived object.

skills.name: export_h5ad
skills.label: Export h5ad
skills.description: Materialize the current object to disk and return a file artifact.

target_object_id.description: Object to export. Defaults to the active object.

skills.name: export_markers_csv
skills.label: Export markers CSV
skills.description: Export the latest marker or differential expression result as CSV.

target_object_id.description: Result object to export.
